title: GhJSON Extension: smarthopper.state (v1.0)
description: Extension for SmartHopper component state. Captures selected AI provider name and canvas selections.

selectedProviderName.description: Name of the selected AI provider (e.g. 'OpenAI', 'MistralAI'). Omit or use 'Default' to use the global default provider.

selectedObjects.description: Component integer IDs of objects selected on the canvas by this component.
